params.signature: The EIP-712 signature from the user.

params.proof: The proof of settlement (e.g., XCM message receipt, state proof).

lockIntent((address,address,uint256,uint.notice: Locks assets and registers a signed intent.

refundIntent((address,address,uint256,ui.notice: Refunds the user if the intent has expired without fulfillment.

settleIntent((address,address,uint256,ui.notice: Settles an intent by providing proof of fulfillment on the destination chain.
